clusters.label: test-bug
clusters.fix: Root cause: AccountService.getAccountStatistics/getHighValueAccounts require BOTH ownerId AND tenantId (multi-tenancy enforcement). Tests predated this and passed only ownerId. Added tenantId='tenant-1' to Account.create calls and to service calls (AccountService.test.ts + additional.test.ts, 5 tests). Hierarchy test assertion corrected: cross-tenant parent lookup correctly returns 'Parent account not found' (tenant isolation — parent is invisible), not 'different tenant' message.

clusters.signature: OpportunityService + integration forecast — result.isSuccess false and totalPipelineValue=0 (5 failures total). Likely same tenantId pattern — investigate next iteration.
